message:
test(core): add 9 s55e conformance oracle tests for IN subquery, JOIN predicates, COUNT DISTINCT, LEFT JOIN semantics

Covers: nested IN subquery with WHERE, complex ON clause (AND/OR/LEFT JOIN filter),
COUNT/SUM DISTINCT with NULLs, NULL IN list semantics, UPDATE with correlated
aggregate subquery, CTE INSERT...SELECT, aggregate over LEFT JOIN NULLs,
BETWEEN NULL edges, LEFT JOIN WHERE vs ON filter semantics. All 84 s55 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
